title: Migrate delegation from claude -p to Claude Agent SDK
source: Claude Agent SDK (pip install claude-agent-sdk) — native Python async API
description: Replace subprocess claude -p calls with native Agent SDK providing structured output via JSON Schema, streaming events, and in-process MCP configuration.
proposed_changes: Add claude-agent-sdk dependency. Replace delegate_to_agent() with async SDK calls. Use output_format JSON schema. Enable streaming progress events feeding roro. Use allowed_tools per role.
